SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_OnlyAmusementWatchingBattles
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 我年轻的时候也是一个\n环游世界的宝可梦训练家，\p但现在我已经日薄西山，\n唯一的乐趣只有\l看年轻训练家对战了。$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
我年轻的时候也是一个
环游世界的宝可梦训练家，

但现在我已经日薄西山，
唯一的乐趣只有
看年轻训练家对战了。

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_ChallengeVisitingTrainer
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 一个叫{STR_VAR_1}的训练家\n到我家来了，\p你想挑战\n{STR_VAR_1}吗？$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
一个叫{STR_VAR_1}的训练家
到我家来了，

你想挑战
{STR_VAR_1}吗？

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_YouWontBattle
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 你不想对战？好失望，\n我真的很想看你们的对战……$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
你不想对战？好失望，
我真的很想看你们的对战……

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_KeepItTo3On3
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 啊，好，太好了！\p不过我的房子不是\n特别坚固，\p能请你们进行一场\n3对3的对战吗？$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
啊，好，太好了！

不过我的房子不是
特别坚固，

能请你们进行一场
3对3的对战吗？

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_SaveProgressBeforeBattle
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 在你们2个对战前\n要先写入记录。$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
在你们2个对战前
要先写入记录。

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_HopeToSeeGoodMatch
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 我想要看到一场精彩的对战！$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text: 我想要看到一场精彩的对战！

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_BrilliantStandoff
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 是平局哦。\p双方都没有让步\n真是场精彩的比赛！$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
是平局哦。

双方都没有让步
真是场精彩的比赛！

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_ThatWasSuperlative
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 太优秀了！\p我彷佛又看到了\n我年轻的时候！$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
太优秀了！

我彷佛又看到了
我年轻的时候！

SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.label: SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Text_TooBadForYou
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.raw_text: 啊，太糟糕了！\p但是确实是场不错的对战。\n希望下次你可以赢。$
SootopolisCity_MysteryEventsHouse_1F_Tex.display_text:
啊，太糟糕了！

但是确实是场不错的对战。
希望下次你可以赢。
